ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "time" TEXT /* Date and time the weather data was collected */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., SSW, CALM) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "wind_gust" REAL /* Wind gust in miles per hour */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure in inches */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in inches */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Weather condition (e.g., Partly Cloudy, Cloudy) */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the weather station */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the weather data (e.g., sensor, satellite) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the weather data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the weather data */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the weather data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "last_ip" TEXT /* Last IP address used by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "request_url" TEXT /* URL of the request made */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to respond to the request in milliseconds */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)
